text:
- [escalation] Sir Richard: Rich Lang forwarded a bibliography on the Latter Rain movement from David Kling.
- [escalation] Sir Richard: Rich Lang forwarded a message from Alison Kling about Erin's show.
- [escalation] Rich Lang: Rich Lang forwarded a blog post about the decline of America as a superpower.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch reported website bugs and design feedback for a CG site.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch requests a text edit changing 'human' to 'our' in a specific line.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch proposes changing popups to hyperlinked pages if popups cannot be user-edited.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch approves the 'what' page format and requests navigation bar and layout changes.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch requests moving the VG page inside performances and adjusting the CG logo color.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch reports popup sizing issues on the first page where content extends outside the viewport.
- [scheduling] reminders@drchrono.com: Appointment reminder for Monty Owens, MN, PMHNP-BC on Monday, June 22, 2026 at 10:30 AM PDT.
- [follow up] Michael Lang: Self-generated inbox summary indicating people are awaiting replies and shared items need attention.
